_comment: All-Teams Control: the main menu's new debug/testing battle option, shown with the real default spawn (all_teams_control:true, no drill/scenario override) so the clip matches exactly what pressing the button produces -- a normal two-army battle where the PLAYER commands both sides (no AI on team 1). Team 0's line (top, seed 12345: uid 0-4) is box-selected and marched forward as a group; then team 1's line (bottom, uid 5-9), which a normal battle would leave to the AI, is box-selected and marched forward too -- proving control isn't restricted to team 0. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
